problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
